description: Commit, push to GitHub, rebuild on VPS via Docker, and trigger a test run to verify the output matches the reference dashboard.
steps: Step 1: Git add, commit with message 'feat: rewrite dashboard builder to match reference design', push to origin main

Step 2: SSH to VPS (sshpass -p 'Hamza@19951995' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no aichaguimaoune@35.255.81.115) and run: cd ~/apps/mydash-dashboard-builder && git pull origin main && docker compose build --no-cache && docker compose up -d

Step 3: Trigger test run: curl -X POST https://mydash.shopinzo.bond/api/runs -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"product_name":"Varicose 3 vein cream - HB - Version 3","lf_product_id":"prod_aDpxcS0svBWwkXizTuyJ0","date_from":"2026-04-01","date_to":"2026-06-18","default_cc":"966","output_filename":"COD_LF_Full_Merged.xlsx"}'
Step 4: Verify the run completes by polling the run status endpoint
acceptance_criteria: Docker compose build and up completes on VPS
Test run is triggered and returns a run ID
verification: Check git log shows the new commit on main
SSH to VPS and verify containers are running: docker compose ps
Verify run was triggered: check API response for run ID
